safest_plan.entry_basis: zero_live chart workflow note 'long from 2.97$ where there's liquidity'; full spot buy zone is the 2.88-3.08 demand/OTE cluster (chart green zone + grade entry 2.88-3.08)

targets.basis: zero_live grade 'initial upside into prior resistance' = chart 0.618 fib (3.15$); only a modest first target above the 2.97 entry
zero_live chart label '3.45$ - TP and small short if aligned with majors' (natural take-profit for a long)
zero_live grade '4.20+ if structure holds' (estimated/aggressive; above the 3.69-3.80 supply Zero flags for shorts, so structure-dependent)

safest_plan.stop_basis: below the 2.88-3.08 demand cluster; chart + grade both say 'Close below 2.88' invalidates the long

stance_by_source.summary: Wants to buy the discount: long the 2.88-3.08 demand zone (preferred 2.97) for a swing higher, but also short/take-profit into 3.45 and 3.69-3.80 supply if Bitcoin aligns; whole plan is tied to Bitcoin's move.

conflicts: Single source, but it's a two-sided plan, not a clean buy: Zero wants to LONG the 2.88-3.08 discount yet also SHORT into the 3.45 and 3.69-3.80 zones above if Bitcoin aligns.
Staleness: this read is from 12 May 2025 (over a year old). The price context it was drawn in has long passed, so treat every level as illustrative rather than live-actionable.
On the chart, price was already at 3.45 (the take-profit / short zone) ABOVE the 2.97 buy entry - the long needs a pullback into 2.88-3.08 that may never come.
Live price is unknown (not provided), so we cannot confirm where TON sits relative to this plan today.
The extracted '3.15 target' is actually the 0.618 discount fib on the chart - a minor first step up from 2.97, not a major upside objective.
plain_english: This is one over-a-year-old Toncoin chart that grades as textbook but only describes buying a dip into the 2.88-3.08 area (best around 2.97), then taking profit up at 3.45 and 3.69-3.80. It is a two-sided plan tied to Bitcoin's direction, and when it was drawn the price was already up at 3.45, above where you'd want to buy. Because it's so old, conditional on a pullback that may not happen, and we don't even know the current price, do not act on it. Wait: only consider a small buy if Toncoin actually trades back down into 2.88-3.08 and you confirm Bitcoin is supportive, with an exit if it closes below 2.88.
